Appearances:

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-06-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Sep-06-2017 Continued To Oct-23-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryan Jones in Propria Persona.
Jorelle Jones in Propria Persona.

Ryan stated that they were not aware of the requirement to file an inventory and appraisal, that he will speak with the Examiner and that he was told he did not need an Attorney because there is no dispute between the family. Ryan also stated that they have taken control of the bank accounts and the insurance policies, that one Brother is still living in the home, that there is no dispute as to that either and that he spoke with a legal document preparer. The Court explained the necessary steps that need to be taken when administering an estate and urged the parties to seek Counsel. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to October 23, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Orders to Appear are off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Continued To Sep-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the two administrators to appear on September 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Inventory and Appraisal has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)
